subcodes.first_line: O ye lamps enkindled with the resplendent light of the Covenant, ye sacred realities that are steadfast in the Testament and illumined by its effulgence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای زجاجات سراج وهاج پیمان حقائق مقدسه که ثابت میثاق و مقتبس از اشراقند
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
